exercises.name: Toy Carry Hold
exercises.steps: 1. Hold light rattle or stuffed toy above chest. 2. Encourage baby to grasp and hold 5-10 seconds. 3. Repeat 8-10 times per session.
exercises.benefits: Builds grip strength and upper body muscle.

exercises.name: Assisted Arm Raises
exercises.steps: 1. Lay baby on back. 2. Gently lift both arms overhead holding 3 seconds. 3. Lower slowly, repeat 10 times.
exercises.benefits: Shoulder and arm development for weight gain.

exercises.name: Leg Press Assist
exercises.steps: 1. Baby on back, knees bent. 2. Press feet gently against your palms. 3. Hold resistance 5 seconds, 8 reps.

exercises.name: Toy Carry Walk
exercises.steps: 1. Give stuffed toy or small bag (200g). 2. Walk holding across room 10 steps. 3. Rest and repeat 3 times.

exercises.name: Squat Toy Pickup
exercises.steps: 1. Place toys on floor. 2. Squat down slowly to pick up. 3. Stand tall holding toy, 10 reps.

exercises.name: Overhead Reach Hold
exercises.steps: 1. Hold toy overhead with both hands. 2. Stretch up holding 5 seconds. 3. Lower slowly, 12 reps.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull Ups
exercises.steps: 1. Use low bar or playground equipment. 2. Pull chin above bar with spotter help. 3. 6-8 slow reps.

exercises.name: Wall Sit Hold
exercises.steps: 1. Back against wall, knees 90°. 2. Hold thighs parallel to ground. 3. 30 seconds, 3 sets.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.steps: 1. Sit holding 1-2kg dumbbells at shoulders. 2. Press overhead fully. 3. Lower controlled, 10 reps.

exercises.name: Weighted Squats
exercises.steps: 1. Hold 2-5kg dumbbells at sides. 2. Squat until thighs parallel. 3. Stand squeezing glutes, 3x12.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.steps: 1. Lie on bench, grip barbell shoulder width. 2. Lower to chest slowly. 3. Press up powerfully, 3x10.

exercises.name: Barbell Rows
exercises.steps: 1. Bend at hips 45°, back flat. 2. Pull barbell to lower chest. 3. Lower controlled, 3x10.

exercises.name: Deadlifts
exercises.steps: 1. Barbell over mid-foot, hinge hips. 2. Grip bar, keep back neutral. 3. Drive through heels to stand, 3x8.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.steps: 1. Barbell at collarbone level. 2. Press overhead locking elbows. 3. Lower controlled, 3x8-10.

exercises.name: Weighted Dips
exercises.steps: 1. Parallel bars with weight belt (5-10kg). 2. Lower to 90° elbows. 3. Press up fully, 3x8.

exercises.name: Seated Bicep Curls
exercises.steps: 1. Sit holding 2-5kg dumbbells. 2. Curl to shoulders slowly. 3. Lower 3 seconds, 3x12.

exercises.name: Chair Leg Extensions
exercises.steps: 1. Sit with 1-2kg ankle weights. 2. Extend one leg straight. 3. Hold 3 sec, lower, 2x15/leg.

exercises.name: Seated Chest Press
exercises.steps: 1. Machine chest press, light weight. 2. Press handles forward fully. 3. Return controlled, 3x12.

exercises.name: Tummy Time
exercises.steps: 1. Lay on soft surface tummy down. 2. Place toys ahead to lift head. 3. 3-5 min, 4x daily supervised.

exercises.name: Bicycle Legs
exercises.steps: 1. On back holding feet gently. 2. Pedal legs cycling motion. 3. 2 min with songs/smiles.

exercises.name: Assisted Rolling
exercises.steps: 1. On back, bend one knee across. 2. Guide roll to tummy gently. 3. Both sides 5x.

exercises.name: Bear Crawl
exercises.steps: 1. Hands and knees position. 2. Crawl forward 10 steps opposite limbs. 3. Return, 3 rounds.

exercises.name: Ball Roll Sit
exercises.steps: 1. Sit legs extended. 2. Roll ball side to side reaching. 3. 5 min continuous.

exercises.name: Frog Jumps
exercises.steps: 1. Squat like frog position. 2. Jump forward 2-3 feet. 3. 10 jumps continuous.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.steps: 1. Feet together arms sides. 2. Jump out wide arms overhead. 3. Jump back, 30 reps.

exercises.name: Push Ups
exercises.steps: 1. Plank position hands shoulder width. 2. Lower chest to ground. 3. Push up, 3x10.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.steps: 1. Forearm plank position. 2. Body straight tight core. 3. Hold 30-60 sec, 3 sets.

exercises.name: Pull Ups
exercises.steps: 1. Grip bar wider than shoulders. 2. Pull chin above bar. 3. Lower controlled, 3x6-8.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.steps: 1. Stand before 12-18″ box. 2. Jump landing softly both feet. 3. Step down, 3x10.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Slams
exercises.steps: 1. Hold 4-6kg ball overhead. 2. Slam down powerfully. 3. Catch and repeat, 3x15.

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.steps: 1. Feet shoulder width. 2. Lower hips back until thighs parallel. 3. Drive up through heels, 3x12.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.steps: 1. Lie flat grip barbell shoulder width. 2. Lower to mid-chest. 3. Press up explosively, 3x10.

exercises.name: Pull Ups
exercises.steps: 1. Grip bar overhand shoulder width. 2. Pull chest to bar. 3. Lower controlled, 3x8.

exercises.name: Seated March
exercises.steps: 1. Sit tall in firm chair. 2. March knees alternately high. 3. Continue 2 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Wall Push Ups
exercises.steps: 1. Face wall hands shoulder height. 2. Bend elbows lean forward. 3. Push back, 3x12.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Lifts
exercises.steps: 1. Sit tall lift one leg straight. 2. Hold 5 seconds at top. 3. 12 reps each leg.

exercises.name: Supervised Tummy Time
exercises.steps: 1. Tummy down on soft mat. 2. Encourage head lifting with toys. 3. 3 min sessions 4x daily.

exercises.name: Seated Play
exercises.steps: 1. Support baby in sitting position. 2. Place toys around for reaching. 3. 5 min sessions.

exercises.name: Gentle Leg Movements
exercises.steps: 1. On back bicycle legs slowly. 2. Alternate leg lifts gently. 3. 3 min continuous.

exercises.name: Dance Freeze Game
exercises.steps: 1. Play upbeat music for dancing. 2. Freeze when music stops. 3. 10 minutes continuous play.

exercises.name: Bubble Chase
exercises.steps: 1. Blow bubbles in open space. 2. Toddler jumps/pops bubbles. 3. Continue full bubble solution.

exercises.name: Obstacle Course
exercises.steps: 1. Pillows to step over, crawl under. 2. Complete circuit continuously. 3. 3 full rounds.

exercises.name: Jump Rope
exercises.steps: 1. Proper rope length adjustment. 2. Jump continuous rhythm. 3. 1 minute on, 30 sec rest x8.

exercises.name: High Knees Run
exercises.steps: 1. Run place knees chest height. 2. Arms pump vigorously. 3. 45 sec work, 15 sec rest x10.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.steps: 1. Plank position high plank. 2. Drive knees to chest rapidly. 3. 30 sec max effort x8.

exercises.name: Stationary Bike
exercises.steps: 1. Proper seat height adjustment. 2. Moderate resistance steady pace. 3. 25 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Rowing Machine
exercises.steps: 1. Proper foot strap position. 2. Full stroke smooth rhythm. 3. 20 minutes steady pace.

exercises.name: Battle Ropes
exercises.steps: 1. Squat position rope ends. 2. Alternate waves/slams 30 sec. 3. Rest 30 sec x10 rounds.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swings
exercises.steps: 1. Hinge hips holding kettlebell. 2. Explosive hip snap to chest height. 3. 15 reps x4 rounds.

exercises.name: Rowing Intervals
exercises.steps: 1. 500m row max effort. 2. 2 min easy pace recovery. 3. Repeat 6-8 intervals.

exercises.name: Stair Climber
exercises.steps: 1. Moderate pace consistent stepping. 2. Hold good upright posture. 3. 25-30 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Water Walking
exercises.steps: 1. Waist deep pool water. 2. Walk brisk pace against resistance. 3. 20-25 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Seated Aerobics
exercises.steps: 1. Seated marching arm movements. 2. Follow video instructor pace. 3. 25 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Recumbent Bike
exercises.steps: 1. Adjust seat for comfort. 2. Steady moderate resistance. 3. 25-30 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Passive Leg Movements
exercises.steps: 1. Baby on back gently. 2. Move legs in cycling motion slowly. 3. 2-3 min gentle.

exercises.name: Seated Supported Play
exercises.steps: 1. Full support sitting position. 2. Reach for toys around body. 3. 3 min sessions.

exercises.name: Arm Circles Assist
exercises.steps: 1. On back gently circle arms. 2. Very slow smooth motion. 3. 2 min continuous.

exercises.name: Seated Clap Dance
exercises.steps: 1. Sit in stable chair. 2. Clap and sway to music. 3. 10 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Lifts
exercises.steps: 1. Sit lift one leg at a time. 2. Hold 3 seconds each. 3. 8 reps per leg.

exercises.name: Ball Pat Seated
exercises.steps: 1. Sit with ball in lap. 2. Pat bounce rhythmically. 3. 8-10 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Chair Cardio Dance
exercises.steps: 1. Sit marching punches to music. 2. High energy arm movements. 3. 20 min continuous.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Press
exercises.steps: 1. Sit press against immovable object. 2. Hold 5 sec isometric. 3. 12 reps per leg.

exercises.name: Upper Body Ergometer
exercises.steps: 1. Arm cycle machine moderate pace. 2. Steady continuous rhythm. 3. 20 minutes.

exercises.name: Recumbent Bike
exercises.steps: 1. Adjust for full leg extension. 2. Low-moderate resistance steady. 3. 30 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Upper Body Ergometer
exercises.steps: 1. Adjust seat for comfort. 2. Arm cycle steady moderate pace. 3. 25 minutes continuous.

exercises.name: Seated Elliptical
exercises.steps: 1. Adjust seat position comfortable. 2. Dual arm/leg motion steady. 3. 25-30 minutes.

exercises.name: Chair Squats
exercises.steps: 1. Stand before firm chair. 2. Lower until butt touches seat. 3. Stand up fully, 3x15.

exercises.name: Wall Supported Push Ups
exercises.steps: 1. Hands on wall shoulder height. 2. Bend elbows lean forward. 3. Push back, 3x15.

exercises.name: Seated Row Machine
exercises.steps: 1. Adjust seat/weight light resistance. 2. Pull handles to torso. 3. Return controlled, 3x15.

exercises.name: Seated Ab Crunches
exercises.steps: 1. Sit tall arms crossed chest. 2. Crunch forward 2-3 inches. 3. Return slowly, 3x12.

exercises.name: Seated Torso Twists
exercises.steps: 1. Sit holding light ball (1kg). 2. Twist side to side slowly. 3. 10 reps each direction.

exercises.name: Foot Dorsi Flexion
exercises.steps: 1. Sit pull toes toward shins. 2. Hold resistance band 5 sec. 3. 15 reps each foot.
